## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=high`

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, signed URLs, or real Telegram file URLs were committed.
- [ ] New public endpoints validate authentication or webhook secrets.
- [ ] New file processing paths validate size, MIME type, and failure states.
- [ ] User-visible failures remain visible after bounded retries.
